code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut last_start = -1
mut last_end = -1
mut line_start = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_boundary = false
  if i == n
    is_boundary = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        is_boundary = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  if is_boundary
    mut found_nonws = false
    mut j = line_start
    while j < i
      match string.byte_at(input, j)
      when Some(b)
        if b != 32 and b != 9 and b != 13
          found_nonws = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if found_nonws
      last_start = line_start
      last_end = i
    end
    line_start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if last_start < 0
  println("(none)")
else
  println(string.substring(input, last_start, last_end))
end
